post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 197 (Newbie Game 80)
IKEA Mafia

If you are not currently alive and playing in this game, please do not post. Go to this thread to sign up.

It’s a regular day at your local neighborhood IKEA, complete with massive blue and yellow posters, and the sun is beating down on the faces of many shoppers. Out of the blue, the store closes, and customers are ushered out the doors. What could be the cause of this? Perhaps a rogue employee? Well, you’re right! Alas, the employees have turned against the store, and will do everything they can to destroy it. Their only obstacle - the store goods themselves. Yes, those classic meatballs and sturdy furniture will do anything they can to defend their home.

Credit to mathjay for the OP and important rules. Credit to Binomial-theorem/chaotic_iak/willwang123 for the rule template and e for the role PMs. And to the entire forum for everything.

Important Rules
  1. This list is just a summary of the most important rules, intended for experienced players or as a reminder.
  2. You may not edit or delete your posts, even for typos. Just post again.
  3. Each "day" in this game is 2 weeks in real life while "night" lasts 3 days.
  4. When voting, you must format them correctly. If your vote isn't counted, there is a good chance you messed up the format.
  5. Majority hang is off for Day 1, but it is on starting Day 2.
  6. Do not talk about this game outside your role PM, QTs, or this thread, even if you are dead.
  7. This game is dawn start, so Day 1 will not start until everyone confirms, speaking of which, if you've read all the rules below and are ready to start, say your favorite type of cracker in the thread.
  8. All times will be given in Eastern Standard Time (EST, UTC -5).
  9. If you break a rule that isn't covered here, you will still be warned.
  10. Good luck and have fun.

  • Rules
    Credits to Binomial-theorem, chaotic_iak, willwang123, and fdas amongst others for the rule template.

    • Read the rules. All of them. Read them multiple times if necessary.
    • Do not post at night.
    • You may use your role PM to ask questions, such as rule clarifications or anything else.
    • Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from the mods, including role PMs.
    • Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the mods in charge, unless you are specifically given permission to do so.
    • Do not talk about other ongoing games in this thread.
    • You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others.
    • Hide tags are allowed as long as they conform to the above rule.
    • Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted, even for things like typos: what goes in the thread stays in the thread. Instead, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
    • If you are dead, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
    • Do not use the colors red (#FF0000), blue (#0000FF), green (#008000), or anything that appears similar, as these colors are used for modding purposes.
    • Do not abuse loopholes.

  • Voting and Hanging
    • This game is based on deadline hang. This means that the player with the most votes at the deadline will be hanged.
    • If two players have the same amount of votes when the deadline is reached, the player who reached that amount of votes first will be hanged.
    • Starting Day 2, if a player reaches a majority of votes, then that player will be hanged.
    • Post votes in bold font in the format "Vote: <insert player here>". Since AoPS does not distinguish between usernames with different capitalizations, the capitalization of the player name does not matter. For example, "Vote: fdas" and "Vote: fDAs" are acceptable votes, while "Vote: fdas", "Vote fdas", “vote: fdas, "Vote:fdas", "Vote: fads", "Vote: fdsa", and "Vote: fdas" are not.
    • Spell the username of the player you wish to vote for exactly and do not use nicknames. There is one exception to this; see below.
    • For the purpose of voting, l (lowercase L) and I (uppercase i) are identical.
    • Votes in hide or tip tags will not be counted.
    • Improperly made votes will not be counted under any circumstances. It does not matter if it is the end of the game hammer and everyone revealed their roles. Hint: don’t reveal your roles and declare victory until the mods say the game is officially over. If you want to purposely fake vote, give the mods a heads up in your role PM so it is not accidentally counted.
    • You may vote for a no hang to occur during day. Vote this by including in your post "Vote: No Hang".
    • If there is an even number of players, half of the players voting for no hang is considered a majority, but only for no hang.
    • You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, but if you wish to, unvote in the format "Unvote". An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
    • The moment the deadline passes, no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post, and the game will proceed into twilight.
    • During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
    • Once the end-of-day scene is posted, the person hanged is officially dead and their role will be revealed. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.

  • Activity
    • All times and deadlines will be given in Eastern Standard Time (EST, UTC -5) unless otherwise noted.
    • Each day will be 336 hours (14 days). The moderators may extend the deadline for the end of the day at their discretion. Note that this will be unlikely and will usually only happen in circumstances of extreme inactivity or replacements too close to end of day.
    • The deadline will occur the very second 336 hours has occurred.
    • The night deadline will be 72 hours (3 days) after night begins.
    • When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or their partner(s) (if they have them), the player will lose their chance to perform an action during that night.
    • Any night results will be sent after the night deadline
    • Night will end some time after the night deadline when the mods make the post announcing the end of night. You may not post until the moderators say you can, even if the night deadline has passed.
    • If a player does not make a game-advancing post in a 48-hour period and they are not in V/LA (Vacation/Long Absence), they will receive an in-game prod.
    • If a player does not make a game-advancing post in another 24-hour period after receiving an in-game prod and they are not in V/LA, they will receive a PM prod.
    • If a player does not make a game-advancing post in another 36-hour period after receiving a PM prod and they are not in V/LA, they will be replaced, unless they post before the moderators find a replacement.
    • If a player receives 5 PM Prods, they will be force replaced.
    • If a player is going to be in V/LA, they must post in bold in-thread or PM the mods. The moderators will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long.

  • Etiquette
    • Do not use inappropriate language.
    • Do not make any personal attacks.
    • Follow all of the rules.
    • Be mature.
    • For a minor rule infraction, newbies can receive up to three warnings, SE’s up to two, and IC’s one. If a player commits an infraction after they have run out of warnings, or commits a modkill-level infraction, they will be modkilled or force-replaced at the mods' discretion. Please do not do anything bad enough to deserve a modkill.

  • Moderators
    • atomicpianowitch is the moderator of Mafia Game 197. BobDBuilder321 is the co-moderator of Mafia Game 197.
    • Red-colored text (#FF0000) is used for official votecounts and activity checks by the moderators. It is also used for mafia flavor-related posts.
    • Blue-colored text (#0000FF) is used for the moderators' posts other than votecounts and activity checks.
    • Green-colored text (#00FF00) is used for town flavor-related posts.
    • The not voting section is to be ignored if it contradicts any other part of the votecount.
    • If an error to the votecount is not pointed out within 5 days, the incorrect votecount will become official.
    • The moderators may change the rules at any time.
    • The moderators have the last say in interpreting the rules.
Setup
This game will use the Matrix6 setup. This is a semi-open setup.

In this setup, there are 9 players. Before the game starts, the setup will be randomly chosen from 6 possible role combinations:
  1. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 2 Mafia Goons
  2. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Mafia Goon, 1 Mafia Roleblocker
  3. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town 1-Shot Bulletproof, 1 Town Tracker, 2 Mafia Goons
  4. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 1 Town 1-Shot Bulletproof, 1 Mafia Roleblocker, 1 Mafia Goon
  5. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 2 Mafia Goons
  6. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Tracker, 1 Town Doctor, 2 Mafia Goons
Also there are a couple other setup mechanics that should be clarified:
  • This game is Dawn start until everyone confirms, at which point it will be Day 1, and the deadline will be 14 days from then.
  • There are no Night 0 actions.
  • Doctors cannot protect themselves two nights in a row.
  • If applicable, a Mafia Roleblocker's action takes precedence over a Town Jailkeeper's action.
  • Mafia roleblocker cannot kill and roleblock in the same night.
  • Cop results are sane.
  • Mafia may only discuss in the mafia Quicktopic during night.

Role PMs
Vanilla Townie Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>!


You are a Swedish Meatball (Vanilla Townie).

You are the most well-known item at IKEA. No matter how many of you there are, they never seem to run out.
You have no night actions, but your power comes in your voice and your vote.

You win when all threats to the town have been eliminated and there is at least one town player alive.

You can find the game thread here.
Town Cop Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>!


You are an IKEA Lamp (Cop).

Your tall shape makes you an ominous figure in any room. Your skills at illumination allow you to see many things that others can not.
Each night, you may PM me the name of one player to inspect. You will receive a result of innocent or guilty (town or mafia), or that you got no result (you were somehow blocked).

You win when all opposing factions are dead and there is at least one town member alive, or nothing can prevent that from happening..

You can find the game thread here.
Town Doctor Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>!


You are IKEA Frozen Yogurt (Doctor).

They call you frozen yogurt, and yet everyone knows that it’s a silly name for soft-serve ice cream. And who wouldn’t be emotionally healed by a two-dollar ice cream cone?
Each night you may PM me the name of a player to protect. That night, one kill targeting that player will fail (unless you were somehow blocked). You may not protect yourself two nights in a row.

You win when all opposing factions are dead and there is at least one town member alive, or nothing can prevent that from happening.

You can find the game thread here.
Town 1-Shot Bulletproof Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>!


You are an IKEA Couch (1-Shot Bulletproof).

You are sometimes comfortable, but oftentimes very stiff and not fun to sit on. At least we know you won’t get damaged anytime soon.
If at any point in the night you are targeted to be killed, you will be protected by your bulletproof vest. However, after one shot it wears off, and you become a vanilla townie afterwards.

You win when all opposing factions are dead and there is at least one town member alive, or nothing can prevent that from happening.

You can find the game thread here.
Town Jailkeeper Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>!


You are Fluffy Pillows (Town Jailkeeper).

The IKEA employees are supposed to be against you, but sometimes they lose themselves in your folds of fluff on soft.
Each night, you may PM me the name of one player to target. That player will be roleblocked, and unable to perform any actions. However, they will also be protected, safe from any kills.

You win when all opposing factions are dead and there is at least one town member alive, or nothing can prevent that from happening.

You can find the game thread here.
Town Tracker Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>!


You are a Stuffed Animal (Town Tracker).

You sit in those big bins, motionless, your eyes watching little children pass.
Each night, you may PM me the name of one player to track. You will receive the player(s) that the person targeted, if any, or that you got no result (you were somehow blocked).

You win when all opposing factions are dead and there is at least one town member alive, or nothing can prevent that from happening.

You can find the game thread here.
Mafia Goon Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>!

You are an IKEA Employee (Mafia Goon).

After closing the store, nothing can stop you and your team from wreaking havoc on this arid wasteland of a store.
Your mafia partner(s) are <partner(s)>. You may discuss in this <quicktopic>. You may also decide on who to kill, which one of you or the other goon(s) will perform.

You win when the mafia obtain the majority and nothing can prevent this from occurring.

You can find the game thread here.
Mafia Roleblocker Role PM wrote:
Welcome <player>!

You are an IKEA Manager (Mafia Roleblocker).

Not only do you have the highest authority over the employees, but you have the power to control which products are sold.
Your mafia partner(s) are <partner(s)>. You may discuss in this <quicktopic>. You may also decide on who to kill, which one of you or the goon(s) will perform.
You may roleblock a player so that they cannot perform a night action that night. However, you may not kill and roleblock in the same night.

You win when the mafia obtain the majority and nothing can prevent this from occurring.

You can find the game thread here.

Each night you may PM me the name of a player to protect. That night, one kill targeting that player will fail (unless you were somehow blocked). You may not protect yourself two nights in a row.
 
You win when all opposing factions are dead and there is at least one town member alive, or nothing can prevent that from happening.
 
You can find the game thread [url=https://artofproblemsolving.com/community/c49h2027162_mafia_game_197_newbie_game_80_ikea_mafia]here[/url].
[/quote]
[quote=Town 1-Shot Bulletproof Role PM]
Welcome <player>!
 
 
You are an [color=#0f0]IKEA Couch (1-Shot Bulletproof)[/color].

You are sometimes comfortable, but oftentimes very stiff and not fun to sit on. At least we know you won’t get damaged anytime soon. 
If at any point in the night you are targeted to be killed, you will be protected by your bulletproof vest. However, after one shot it wears off, and you become a vanilla townie afterwards. 
 
You win when all opposing factions are dead and there is at least one town member alive, or nothing can prevent that from happening.
 
You can find the game thread [url=https://artofproblemsolving.com/community/c49h2027162_mafia_game_197_newbie_game_80_ikea_mafia]here[/url].
[/quote]
[quote=Town Jailkeeper Role PM]
Welcome <player>!
 
 
You are [color=#0f0]Fluffy Pillows (Town Jailkeeper)[/color].

The IKEA employees are supposed to be against you, but sometimes they lose themselves in your folds of fluff on soft. 
Each night, you may PM me the name of one player to target. That player will be roleblocked, and unable to perform any actions. However, they will also be protected, safe from any kills. 
 
You win when all opposing factions are dead and there is at least one town member alive, or nothing can prevent that from happening.
 
You can find the game thread [url=https://artofproblemsolving.com/community/c49h2027162_mafia_game_197_newbie_game_80_ikea_mafia]here[/url].
 
[/quote]
[quote=Town Tracker Role PM]
Welcome <player>!
 
 
You are a [color=#0f0]Stuffed Animal (Town Tracker)[/color].

You sit in those big bins, motionless, your eyes watching little children pass.
Each night, you may PM me the name of one player to track. You will receive the player(s) that the person targeted, if any, or that you got no result (you were somehow blocked).
 
You win when all opposing factions are dead and there is at least one town member alive, or nothing can prevent that from happening.
 
You can find the game thread [url=https://artofproblemsolving.com/community/c49h2027162_mafia_game_197_newbie_game_80_ikea_mafia]here[/url].
 
[/quote]
[quote=Mafia Goon Role PM]
Welcome <player>! 
 
You are an [color=#f00]IKEA Employee (Mafia Goon)[/color].

After closing the store, nothing can stop you and your team from wreaking havoc on this arid wasteland of a store.
Your mafia partner(s) are <partner(s)>. You may discuss in this <quicktopic>. You may also decide on who to kill, which one of you or the other goon(s) will perform.

You win when the mafia obtain the majority and nothing can prevent this from occurring.

You can find the game thread [url=https://artofproblemsolving.com/community/c49h2027162_mafia_game_197_newbie_game_80_ikea_mafia]here[/url].
[/quote]
[quote=Mafia Roleblocker Role PM]
Welcome <player>! 
 
You are an[color=#f00] IKEA Manager (Mafia Roleblocker)[/color].

Not only do you have the highest authority over the employees, but you have the power to control which products are sold. 
Your mafia partner(s) are <partner(s)>. You may discuss in this <quicktopic>. You may also decide on who to kill, which one of you or the goon(s) will perform.
You may roleblock a player so that they cannot perform a night action that night. However, you may not kill and roleblock in the same night.

You win when the mafia obtain the majority and nothing can prevent this from occurring.
 
You can find the game thread [url=https://artofproblemsolving.com/community/c49h2027162_mafia_game_197_newbie_game_80_ikea_mafia]here[/url].
[/quote]

i think town should favor a more cautious playstyle than scum
because at the beginning of the game scum has way way way more information than town
and as you play more games youll see just how likely it is for early game reads to be wrong
so currently - and this is my opinion - the people who are scumreading a lot of people and developing a lot of hard reads early on are more scummy than towny
because scum want to hang people asap
town should want to watch and observe carefully and then decide who they think is the most suspicious
ik you're all new and excited but its something to think about, because in a theoretical random hang, its way more likely for town to be hung than scum

For Snoozing
How to use your action tonight.

If robot is town, this means your action is useless because you die tonight.
Therefore, when using your action assume robot is mafia, but only make this assumption for purposes of deciding your night action.

If the hang kills mafia, then you should track robot as they are the only mafia left when you assume they are mafia.

If the hang kills town, then you should either track whoever you think is most likely to be robot's partner assuming robot is scum, or robot. (You're trying to guess which one submits the kill.)

post_rendered:
When you fake claim a town power role in a closed setup, I suppose you might no kill to make your claim seem legit.
Mafia usually kills claimed power roles first. So, if you claimed a town power role and it turns out that a vanilla townie died the next night, it might make your claim lose credibility (at least to a certain degree). If nobody died the night after you claimed, you can make it seem like there was a town protective role that protected you.
